questions.question_text: CO Mapping Explain the challenges faced in international business. 1 What encourages firm to internationalize? 1 What are the negative impacts of trade barriers on global business? 2 What is globalization? 2 What are the goals of competitive strategy? 3 What are the threatening moves and non-threatening moves by a corporate? 3 Explain significance of CSR for MNCs. 4 Explain any unique HR practice of Indian MNC. 4 CO Mapping
Explain the role of IMF and World Bank in International Business. 1
What is global competitive advantage, explain the factors responsible for competitive advantage. 1 CO Mapping
Explain the key drivers of globalization in detail. 2
What are the potential benefits and risks of Technology Transfer. 2 CO Mapping
While formulating a competitive strategy, what factors should be kept in mind by any leader of an MNC? 3
Discuss the risks associated with managing cultural diversity 4
Suggest HR strategies to address the challenges faced by MNCs. 4
